---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve SurfaceQ
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug, triage
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
A clear description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment
- **OS**: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Browser**: [e.g., Chrome 120, Edge 120]
- **Extension Version**: [e.g., 1.0.0]
- **Server Version**: [e.g., 1.0.0]
- **Node.js Version**: [e.g., 18.19.0]

## Console Errors
If applicable, paste any errors from the browser console or server logs.

```
Paste error output here
```

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this isn't a duplicate
- [ ] I have included steps to reproduce the bug
- [ ] I have included relevant error messages or screenshots
